name: Vegetable Momos
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Mixed vegetables, parboiled - finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt ghee in a wok or skillet. Add ginger, garlic, and onion; stir fry for 1 minute.
2. Add garam masala, chili powder, pepper, salt, and soy sauce. Stir-fry for 30 seconds.
3. Add the mixed vegetables and mix well. Remove from heat and place in a bowl.
4. Add tofu and toss well to combine. Allow mixture to cool and drain excess liquid.
5. Place about 1 tablespoon of filling into each momo wrapper. Seal closed with a little water.
6. Steam over a steaming rack for 15 to 20 minutes.
7. Serve hot with momo sauce.
